response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the burnt-in screen text and the provided Reference JSON, although the video contains specific segments of the song 'Identity' rather than a single continuous take. I have prioritized the burnt-in text for transcription as it is the most reliable guide. The Reference JSON was used to fill in gaps and verify the lyrics of the song segments. I have discarded the unused lyrics from the Reference JSON and kept the timestamps strictly tied to the vocal audio. During the dialogue segment, I have transcribed Kronii's English and translated Wata-mama's Japanese, ensuring that pauses are respected with appropriate subtitle splits.
